current_scope.description: Classification and measurement of financial assets and financial liabilities; impairment (expected credit losses); hedge accounting.

legacy_scope.description: Pre-IFRS 9 engagements and jurisdictions with delayed adoption may reference IAS 39 for historical measurement categories and incurred loss impairment.
legacy_scope.routingPolicy: Do not apply IAS 39 as default for current-period classification under IFRS 9 adoption
legacy_scope.historicalUse: Comparative periods, first-time adoption overlays, and explicit legacy engagement configuration only

replaced_standard.replacementScope: Partial — IFRS 9 replaced classification, measurement, and impairment portions; IFRS 7 disclosure requirements continue alongside IFRS 9

superseded_references.topic: Classification and measurement of financial instruments

ias39.label: IAS 39 — Legacy Reference
ias39.note: IAS 39 references must not auto-route in TB Intelligence or Mapping Engine for current IFRS 9 engagements

classificationTaxonomy.label: Amortized Cost
classificationTaxonomy.measurementBasis: amortised cost using effective interest method
eligibilityCriteria: Contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest (SPPI)

classificationTaxonomy.label: Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income
classificationTaxonomy.measurementBasis: fair value with changes in OCI (debt instruments) or fair value (equity election)
eligibilityCriteria: Hold-to-collect-and-sell business model with SPPI, or
Equity instrument irrevocable FVOCI election on initial recognition

classificationTaxonomy.label: Fair Value Through Profit or Loss
classificationTaxonomy.measurementBasis: fair value with changes in profit or loss
eligibilityCriteria: Default category when AC or FVOCI criteria not met
May include assets held for trading or designated at FVTPL
